note: Several states impose specific notice and disclosure requirements on automatic (evergreen) renewal clauses in consumer and some commercial contracts.

Several states (e.g. auto-renewal statutes in California and New York) impose minimum notice-period floors before a non-renewal or termination notice becomes effective, independent of what the contract specifies.
Retroactive termination or revival language can raise separate issues under bankruptcy law (ipso facto clauses) if attempted around a counterparty's insolvency.
